message:
feat(dashboard): add Deadline Monitoring panels to Grafana dashboard

Add dashboard panels for the new deadline/checkpoint observability
metrics: deadline warnings, violations, remaining seconds,
checkpoint intervals, and stuck-task detection. These panels provide
operational visibility into obligation deadline compliance at a glance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -586,6 +586,131 @@
       ],
       "title": "Scheduler Poll Duration",
       "type": "timeseries"
+    },
+    {
+      "collapsed": false,
+      "gridPos": { "h": 1, "w": 24, "x": 0, "y": 34 },
+      "id": 16,
+      "panels": [],
+      "title": "Deadline Monitoring",
+      "type": "row"
+    },
+    {
+      "datasource": { "type": "prometheus", "uid": "${datasource}" },
+      "fieldConfig": {
+        "defaults": {
+          "color": { "mode": "palette-classic" },
+          "custom": {
+            "axisCenteredZero": false,
+            "axisColorMode": "text",
+            "axisLabel": "",
+            "axisPlacement": "auto",
+            "barAlignment": 0,
+            "drawStyle": "line",
+            "fillOpacity": 10,
+            "gradientMode": "none",
+            "hideFrom": { "legend": false, "tooltip": false, "viz": false },
+            "lineInterpolation": "linear",
+            "lineWidth": 1,
+            "pointSize": 5,
+            "scaleDistribution": { "type": "linear" },
+            "showPoints": "auto",
+            "spanNulls": false,
+            "stacking": { "group": "A", "mode": "none" },
+            "thresholdsStyle": { "mode": "off" }
+          },
+          "mappings": [],
+          "thresholds": { "mode": "absolute", "steps": [{ "color": "green", "value": null }] },
+          "unit": "ops"
+        },
+        "overrides": [
+          { "matcher": { "id": "byName", "options": "violations" }, "properties": [{ "id": "color", "value": { "fixedColor": "red", "mode": "fixed" } }] },
+          { "matcher": { "id": "byName", "options": "stuck" }, "properties": [{ "id": "color", "value": { "fixedColor": "orange", "mode": "fixed" } }] }
+        ]
+      },
+      "gridPos": { "h": 6, "w": 12, "x": 0, "y": 35 },
+      "id": 17,
+      "options": {
+        "legend": { "calcs": ["sum"], "displayMode": "table", "placement": "bottom", "showLegend": true },
+        "tooltip": { "mode": "multi", "sort": "none" }
+      },
+      "pluginVersion": "10.0.0",
+      "targets": [
+        {
+          "expr": "rate(asupersync_deadline_warnings_total[5m])",
+          "legendFormat": "warnings",
+          "refId": "A"
+        },
+        {
+          "expr": "rate(asupersync_deadline_violations_total[5m])",
+          "legendFormat": "violations",
+          "refId": "B"
+        },
+        {
+          "expr": "rate(asupersync_task_stuck_detected_total[5m])",
+          "legendFormat": "stuck",
+          "refId": "C"
+        }
+      ],
+      "title": "Deadline Warnings & Violations Rate",
+      "type": "timeseries"
+    },
+    {
+      "datasource": { "type": "prometheus", "uid": "${datasource}" },
+      "fieldConfig": {
+        "defaults": {
+          "color": { "mode": "palette-classic" },
+          "custom": {
+            "axisCenteredZero": false,
+            "axisColorMode": "text",
+            "axisLabel": "",
+            "axisPlacement": "auto",
+            "barAlignment": 0,
+            "drawStyle": "line",
+            "fillOpacity": 10,
+            "gradientMode": "none",
+            "hideFrom": { "legend": false, "tooltip": false, "viz": false },
+            "lineInterpolation": "linear",
+            "lineWidth": 1,
+            "pointSize": 5,
+            "scaleDistribution": { "type": "linear" },
+            "showPoints": "auto",
+            "spanNulls": false,
+            "stacking": { "group": "A", "mode": "none" },
+            "thresholdsStyle": { "mode": "off" }
+          },
+          "mappings": [],
+          "thresholds": { "mode": "absolute", "steps": [{ "color": "green", "value": null }] },
+          "unit": "s"
+        },
+        "overrides": []
+      },
+      "gridPos": { "h": 6, "w": 12, "x": 12, "y": 35 },
+      "id": 18,
+      "options": {
+        "legend": { "calcs": ["mean", "p95"], "displayMode": "table", "placement": "bottom", "showLegend": true },
+        "tooltip": { "mode": "multi", "sort": "none" }
+      },
+      "pluginVersion": "10.0.0",
+      "targets": [
+        {
+          "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.5, rate(asupersync_deadline_remaining_seconds_bucket[5m]))",
+          "legendFormat": "p50 Remaining",
+          "refId": "A"
+        },
+        {
+          "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(asupersync_deadline_remaining_seconds_bucket[5m]))",
+          "legendFormat": "p95 Remaining",
+          "refId": "B"
+        },
+        {
+          "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(asupersync_checkpoint_interval_seconds_bucket[5m]))",
+          "legendFormat": "p95 Checkpoint Interval",
+          "refId": "C"
+        }
+      ],
+      "title": "Deadline Remaining & Checkpoint Frequency",
+      "type": "timeseries"
     }
   ],
   "schemaVersion": 38,
